ingredients: COMPOSITION: Cereals, meat and animal derivatives, vegetable protein extracts, derivatives of vegetable origin, oils and fats, vegetables, seeds, minerals. ANALYTICAL CONSTITUENTS: Protein 22.1%, Fat content 12.0%, Crude fibre 6.4%, Crude ash 5.0%, per kg: Vitamin D3 727 IU . Metabolisable energy: 3,405 kcal/kg. ADDITIVES PER KG: Nutritional additives: 3b103 (Iron) 75.3mg, 3b202 (Iodine) 1.9mg, 3b405 (Copper) 7.4mg, 3b502 (Manganese) 7.8mg, 3b603 (Zinc) 132mg, 3b801 (Selenium) 0.2mg, with natural antioxidant.
